title: AxoAmigos
description: A simple mod allowing the player to tame Axolotls!
body:
A simple mod allowing the player to tame Axolotls!



## Is this compatible with X other axolotl mod? --- As of current observance, this mod is fully compatible with other axolotl mods such as [More Axolotl Variants Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mavm) ## What do they do? --- The tamed axolotls will follow their owner in the water and even teleport to their owner if there is an open water area to do so. Taming them does not prevent their urge to fight along side the player against the monsters of the depths like the guardians. ## How do I tame them already??? --- Simply feed your little water critter tropical fish. It's that easy! ## License --- This project is under an MIT license
